workloads.comparabilityNotes: Prepared-session package-surface Gemma-3-270M-shaped decode step. Both sides repeat the same retained inference kernels, identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream, and matching sampled-token readback capture inside one timed sample.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Prepared package inference runs repeat the full decode plan cycle inside each timed sample and report per-cycle normalized timing.
workloads.description: Prepared single-token Gemma-3-270M-shaped decode step with explicit cache/position uniform writes and a sampled-token readback capture.
workloads.name: gemma-3 270m shaped decode 1tok prepared
